case_title: HYDE PARK APARTMENTS, LLC VS. EDWARD PLACEK et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HYDE PARK APARTMENTS, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PLACEK, EDWARD THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 360 HYDE ST. #409, S.F. CA. 94109, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT PLACEK, EDWARD ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR STAY OF EXECUTION, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED BY DEFENDANT PLACEK, EDWARD
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT PLACEK, EDWARD
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT PLACEK, EDWARD

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HYDE PARK APARTMENTS, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT PLACEK, EDWARD DOES 1-20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS, COMPLAINT AND PREJUDGMENT CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF HYDE PARK APARTMENTS, LLC SERVED FEB-25-2007, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1-20, INCLUSIVE

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF JURY FEES AND EXPENSES PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT PLACEK, EDWARD ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF JURY FEES AND EXPENSES PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63 (CRC 3.62)
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF ENTRY OF DEFAULT AND CLERK'S JUDGMENT AND LOST ORIGINAL LEASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF HYDE PARK APARTMENTS, LLC
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS, COMPLAINT & PREJUDGMENT CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF HYDE PARK APARTMENTS, LLC SERVED FEB-25-2007, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PLACEK, EDWARD
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT PLACEK, EDWARD
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $30.83 FILED BY PLAINTIFF HYDE PARK APARTMENTS, LLC
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF REPORTER FEE PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT PLACEK, EDWARD ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF REPORTER FEE PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63 (CRC 3.62)
